examples: For him who understands how to decipher them, armorial bearings are algebra, armorial bearings have a tongue.
On one of them, which was a fringed scarf for a dress of ceremony, I saw the armorial bearings of a Noble, and the letter e.
Boar - a fierce combatant when at bay, and ceases fighting only with its life, and therefore may be properly applied as the armorial bearing of a warrior.
